name: collection
title: Collection
description: A semantic content list for local notices, articles, meetings, and service updates with optional media, metadata, and calendar dates.
useWhen: Showing a short, related set of articles, public notices, meetings, or service updates
Each item needs a descriptive heading link plus optional summary and metadata
A thumbnail, seal, civic icon, or calendar date improves scanning
avoidWhen: The items are actions or settings rather than content destinations
More than roughly six items require filtering, sorting, or pagination
A dense data table communicates column relationships more clearly
An internal scrolling panel would hide content or trap navigation

keyboard: The outer collection and metadata are semantic lists
Each item title is a unique, descriptive link inside a real heading
Calendar dates expose machine-readable and fully spoken values
Media semantics remain with consumer-provided image alt text
Collection never creates an internal scroll region
accessibility.targetSize: Link targets follow their visible text; adjacent controls must meet the Commons 44px default
